root.sql: SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!loan_payment_date_2!' , 'YYYY') as adtm_edate, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_perm(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as c_address, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate, to_snumber((-sign_status * interest_amout )) as c_int, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code , to_snumber(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'พ' ) /*WHERE*/ -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '31/07/2020' and '31/07/2020' ) -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '005428' )
